properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v4 v3 v1 v5 v6 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You took up Your cross, gave it all for us, so that we might know grace You gave up Your crown, an act so profound, we'll never be the same We'll never be the same

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All that we are for Your glory All that we are for Your Name Jesus All that we are for Your glory We praise You, we praise You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The fight is now over, war has been won, the power of Your Name Jesus the Christ has made us alive, we'll never be the same We'll never be the same

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: What a sacrifice, that You laid down Your life To save a sinner's heart like mine I surrender all, all to You my God Hallelujah, hallelujah, hallelujah to Your Name

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All that we are for Your glory All that we are for Your Name Jesus All that we are for Your glory We praise You, we praise You All that we are for Your glory All that we are for Your Name Jesus All that we are for Your glory We praise You, we praise You
